service: ng-signals-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs22.x
  region: us-east-1
  httpApi:
    cors: true

functions:
  ping:
    handler: handler.ping
    events:
      - httpApi:
          path: /api/v1/ping
          method: get

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

custom:
  serverless-offline:
    httpPort: 3000
